real_league_data: 46 league rows including MLS, North America, and Asia expansion targets
league_coverage_connected: Metadata only for expanded leagues; API sync not connected
image_policy: Only provider-supplied, licensed Commons, TheSportsDB, or ARES fallback images are allowed. Transfermarkt, Google Images, club sites, media agencies, and social media scraping are blocked.
